h1.visual_description: Large, bold, blue sans-serif font used for figure and table titles. Includes a numbered prefix followed by a period.
h1.example_text: Figure 1.10. Migrant remittances inflows (in US$ billion)

h2.visual_description: Bold, blue sans-serif font, slightly smaller than H1, used for table titles with a horizontal rule separator.
h2.example_text: Table 1.4. Growth in migrant remittance inflows

visual_matchers.pattern: Blue bold text followed by a chart or graph
Blue bold text followed by a horizontal line and a data grid
Small, grey, italicized or regular sans-serif text starting with 'Source:'
Alternating light blue and white horizontal row shading

markdown_grammar.citation_format: Author-Date parenthetical (e.g., World Bank and KNOMAD (2021))

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Page numbers in bold blue at the bottom outer corners; 'ASEAN Migration Outlook' running footer in blue italics at the bottom center/right, separated by a thin grey horizontal line.
